english_script: Hi guys, it's Lulu. Day 17 of my daily English practice. I keep talking to improve my oral English. Today I watched a video about vitamin D. The video explained why vitamin D is important for our health. It talked about how we can get enough vitamin D. Many people don't have enough vitamin D. This is a big problem in many countries. The video shared some key points about vitamin D. First, vitamin D helps our body use calcium. Calcium is important for strong bones. Without enough vitamin D, our bones can become weak. Second, vitamin D helps our immune system. It helps us fight off sickness. Third, we get vitamin D from sunlight. Our skin makes vitamin D when we are in the sun. But many people stay inside too much. They don't get enough sun. Also, people in cold places get less sun. The video said we should spend 10 to 30 minutes in the sun each day. But we need to be careful not to get sunburn. Fourth, we can get vitamin D from food. Some foods have vitamin D. For example, fatty fish like salmon have vitamin D. Egg yolks also have vitamin D. Some milk and cereal have added vitamin D. The video said it is hard to get enough vitamin D from food alone. So many people need to take vitamin D pills. The video said to talk to a doctor before taking pills. Too much vitamin D can be bad. The video also said vitamin D may help with mood. Some studies show low vitamin D is linked to feeling sad. From this I learned that vitamin D is very important. I should try to get more sun and eat foods with vitamin D. I will also ask my doctor about vitamin D pills. It is a simple way to stay healthy. Thank you for listening, see you tomorrow.
chinese_translation: 大家好，我是Lulu。每日英语练习的第17天。我坚持说话来提高我的英语口语。今天我观看了一个关于维生素D的视频。视频解释了为什么维生素D对我们的健康很重要。它谈到了我们如何获得足够的维生素D。很多人没有足够的维生素D。这在许多国家是一个大问题。视频分享了一些关于维生素D的关键点。第一，维生素D帮助我们的身体利用钙。钙对强健的骨骼很重要。没有足够的维生素D，我们的骨骼会变弱。第二，维生素D帮助我们的免疫系统。它帮助我们抵抗疾病。第三，我们从阳光中获取维生素D。我们的皮肤在晒太阳时会产生维生素D。但是很多人待在室内太多。他们没有获得足够的阳光。而且，寒冷地区的人获得的阳光更少。视频说我们应该每天在阳光下待10到30分钟。但我们需要小心不要晒伤。第四，我们可以从食物中获取维生素D。有些食物含有维生素D。例如，像三文鱼这样的多脂鱼含有维生素D。蛋黄也含有维生素D。一些牛奶和麦片添加了维生素D。视频说仅从食物中获取足够的维生素D很难。所以很多人需要服用维生素D药片。视频说在服药前要咨询医生。过多的维生素D可能有害。视频还说维生素D可能有助于改善情绪。一些研究表明维生素D低与感到悲伤有关。从中学到维生素D非常重要。我应该尝试多晒太阳，吃含有维生素D的食物。我也会问我的医生关于维生素D药片的事。这是一个保持健康的简单方法。谢谢收听，明天见。
concise_english: Hi guys, it's Lulu. Day 17 of my daily English practice. I keep talking to improve my oral English. Today I learned about vitamin D from a video. Vitamin D is important for strong bones and a healthy immune system. We get it from sunlight and some foods like fish and eggs. Many people don't have enough vitamin D. The video said we should spend some time in the sun each day. We can also take vitamin D pills after talking to a doctor. Vitamin D may also help our mood. From this I learned to get more sun and eat foods with vitamin D. It is a simple way to stay healthy. Thank you for listening, see you tomorrow.
concise_chinese: 大家好，我是Lulu。每日英语练习的第17天。我坚持说话来提高我的英语口语。今天我从一个视频中学到了关于维生素D的知识。维生素D对强健的骨骼和健康的免疫系统很重要。我们从阳光和一些食物如鱼和蛋中获取它。很多人没有足够的维生素D。视频说我们应该每天在阳光下待一段时间。我们也可以在咨询医生后服用维生素D药片。维生素D还可能有助于我们的情绪。从中学到要多晒太阳，吃含有维生素D的食物。这是一个保持健康的简单方法。谢谢收听，明天见。
